name: list_payrolls
description: Retrieve all payroll runs for a company. Can be filtered by processing status and date range. Returns calculated totals, check dates, and whether each payroll has been submitted.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the company whose payrolls to list.

parameters.name: processing_statuses
parameters.description: Comma-separated statuses to filter by: unprocessed, processed, or submitted.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter payrolls with pay periods starting on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter payrolls with pay periods ending on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).
